entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The primary agricultural crop studied for production anomalies in India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the rice production study is focused

entities.name: MONSOON PRECIPITATION
entities.description: Rainfall patterns that influence Indian rice production

entities.name: RICE PRODUCTION ANOMALY
entities.description: The deviation in rice production, specifically the record low in 2002

entities.name: FRESHWATER LIMITATION
entities.description: The lack of available surface freshwater causing yield losses

entities.name: SOUTHEASTERN COASTAL REGIONS
entities.description: Specific areas in India where freshwater limitation caused yield losses

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The implication of rice yield losses on local food availability

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL MARKET STABILITY
entities.description: The implication of rice yield losses on global market stability

entities.name: METEOROLOGICAL DROUGHT
entities.description: Extreme weather condition characterized by lack of precipitation affecting rice yield

entities.name: RICE YIELD
entities.description: The amount of rice produced per unit area

entities.name: HYDROLOGICAL MODEL
entities.description: A model used to integrate output for climate indicators

entities.name: SURFACE OBSERVATIONS
entities.description: Ground-based data collection used for climate indicators

entities.name: SATELLITE OBSERVATIONS
entities.description: Remote sensing data used for climate indicators and soil moisture

entities.name: STANDARDIZED PRECIPITATION EVAPOTRANSPIRATION INDEX
entities.description: An indicator of drought based on local surface water balance anomalies

entities.name: LOCAL SURFACE WATER BALANCE ANOMALIES
entities.description: Anomalies in the balance between precipitation and evapotranspiration

entities.name: PRECIPITATION
entities.description: Local rainfall contributing to the surface water balance

entities.name: EVAPOTRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The process of water transfer from land to atmosphere contributing to the surface water balance

entities.name: RENEWABLE SURFACE FRESHWATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The availability of freshwater from non-local sources

entities.name: STANDARDIZED RIVER DISCHARGE INDEX
entities.description: An indicator of renewable surface freshwater availability based on modelled river discharge

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE OBSERVATIONS
entities.description: Data retrieved from satellites to assess soil moisture conditions

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE CONDITIONS
entities.description: The state of water in the soil which determines rice yields
